Part.Source: Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &EmpCod.Visible = False &FilCod.Visible = False &MDFeCod.Visible = False &MDFeTipEmt.Visible = False &CountCte.Visible = False GridCtes.Rows = Page.Rows GridNotas.Rows = Page.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do 'DoTotalizar' EndEvent Event GridCtes.Load &CountCte = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeCteItm Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &gridMDFeCTeItm = MDFeCteItm &gridMDFeCTeFilCod = MDFeCteFilCod &gridMDFeCTeCod = MDFeCteCod &gridMDFeCTeChv = MDFeCteChv &gridMDfeCTeCidCod = MDfeCteCidCod &gridMDFeCTeCidNom = MDFeCteCidNom &gridMdfeCTeUfeCod = MdfeCteUfeCod &gridMDFeCTePso = MDfeCtePso &gridMdfeCTeVlrTot = MDFeCteVlrTot &CountCte += 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DelCTe.FromImage(ActionDelete) &DelCTe.TooltipText = "Remover CT-e" &AlteraCte.FromImage(ActionUpdate) &AlteraCte.TooltipText = "" /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event GridNotas.Load &CountCte = 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeNFeItm Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &gridMDFeNFeItm = MDFeNFeItm &gridMDFeNFeFilCod = MDFeNFeFilCod &gridMDFeNfeCod = MDFeNfeCod &gridMDFeNfeChv = MDFeNfeChv &gridMDfeNfeCidCod = MDfeNfeCidCod &gridMDFeNfeCidNom = MDFeNfeCidNom &gridMdfeNfeUfeCod = MdfeNfeUfeCod &gridMDFeNfePso = MDfeNfePso &GridMDfeNfeVlrTot = MDFeNfeVlrTot &CountCte += 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DelNFe = !'' &AlteraNfe = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ load EndFor EndEvent Event Enter /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'CheckRequiredFields' If &CheckRequiredFieldsResult AND not &HasValidationErrors Do 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' WPMDFe01(!'Documentos', !'Percurso', false) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'WizardPrevious' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPMDFe01(!'Documentos', !'Mdfe', true) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarCtesav' wpSelecCTE_MDFe.Popup(&MDFeDstUfeCod, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod) DO 'DoTotalizar' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarCtes' WPAddMdfeCte.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarNotas' wpSelecNF_MDFe.Popup(&MDFeDstUfeCod, &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod) DO 'DoTotalizar' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAdicionarNotasAv' WPAddMdfeNfe.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'LoadVariablesFromWizardData' If 1 =2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Documentos.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Documentos.FilCod &MDFeCod = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeCod &MDFeTipEmt = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTipEmt &MDFePsoBrt = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFePsoBrt &MDFeVlrTot = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeVlrTot &MDfeUnd = &WizardData.Documentos.MDfeUnd &TotMDFeTotNF = &WizardData.Documentos.TotMDFeTotNF &MDFeTotCTe = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTotCTe &MDFeTotNF = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTotNF &MDFeTipCar = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTipCar &MDFeProPre = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeProPre &MDFeProPreNcm = &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeProPreNcm &CountCte = &WizardData.Documentos.CountCte &MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = &WizardData.Documentos.MdfeIndCarregaPosterior &MdfeIndCanalVerde = &WizardData.Documentos.MdfeIndCanalVerde /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &EmpCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod &FilCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod &MDFeCod = &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod Do 'Load' EndIf if &MDFeCod.IsEmpty() wwMdfe.Link() Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveVariablesToWizardData' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &WizardData.FromJson(&WebSession.Get(&WebSessionKey)) &WizardData.Documentos.EmpCod = &EmpCod &WizardData.Documentos.FilCod = &FilCod &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeCod = &MDFeCod &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTipEmt = &MDFeTipEmt &WizardData.Documentos.MDFePsoBrt = &MDFePsoBrt &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeVlrTot = &MDFeVlrTot &WizardData.Documentos.MDfeUnd = &MDfeUnd &WizardData.Documentos.TotMDFeTotNF = &TotMDFeTotNF &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTotCTe = &MDFeTotCTe &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTotNF = &MDFeTotNF &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeTipCar = &MDFeTipCar &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeProPre = &MDFeProPre &WizardData.Documentos.MDFeProPreNcm = &MDFeProPreNcm &WizardData.Documentos.CountCte = &CountCte &WizardData.Documentos.MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = &MdfeIndCarregaPosterior &WizardData.Documentos.MdfeIndCanalVerde = &MdfeIndCanalVerde &WizardData.Documentos.GridCtes.Clear() For Each Line in GridCtes &GridCtesItem = new() &GridCtesItem.gridMDFeCteItm = &gridMDFeCteItm &GridCtesItem.gridMDFeCteCod = &gridMDFeCteCod &GridCtesItem.gridMDFeCteFilCod = &gridMDFeCteFilCod &GridCtesItem.gridMDFeCteChv = &gridMDFeCteChv &GridCtesItem.gridMDFeCteCidNom = &gridMDFeCteCidNom &GridCtesItem.gridMDfeCteCidCod = &gridMDfeCteCidCod &GridCtesItem.gridMdfeCteUfeCod = &gridMdfeCteUfeCod &GridCtesItem.gridMDfeCtePso = &gridMDfeCtePso &GridCtesItem.GridMDFeCteVlrTot = &GridMDFeCteVlrTot &WizardData.Documentos.GridCtes.Add(&GridCtesItem) EndFor &WizardData.Documentos.GridNotas.Clear() For Each Line in GridNotas &GridNotasItem = new() &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNFeItm = &gridMDFeNFeItm &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNfeCod = &gridMDFeNfeCod &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNFeFilCod = &gridMDFeNFeFilCod &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNfeChv = &gridMDFeNfeChv &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNfeCidNom = &gridMDFeNfeCidNom &GridNotasItem.gridMDfeNfeCidCod = &gridMDfeNfeCidCod &GridNotasItem.gridMdfeNfeUfeCod = &gridMdfeNfeUfeCod &GridNotasItem.gridMDFeNfePso = &gridMDFeNfePso &GridNotasItem.GridMDFeNfeVlrTot = &GridMDFeNfeVlrTot &WizardData.Documentos.GridNotas.Add(&GridNotasItem) EndFor &WizardData.Percurso.EmpCod = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.EmpCod &WizardData.Percurso.AddMDFePerUfeCod = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.AddMDFePerUfeCod &WizardData.Percurso.MDFeDesCidCod = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MDFeDesCidCod &WizardData.Percurso.MDFeDstUfeCod = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MDFeDstUfeCod &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRes &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegCnpj = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegCnpj &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNom = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNom &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroApo = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegNroApo &WizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRef = &EmptyWizardData.Percurso.MdfeSegRef &WizardData.Percurso.GridPercurso.Clear() &WebSession.Set(&WebSessionKey, &WizardData.ToJson()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &PadObs = trim(&MDFeTipCar) PadraoUsuario.Call('G', 'WPMDFe01Documentos', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) GravadocumentosMdfe.call(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MDFeCod,&MDfeUnd,&MDFePsoBrt,&MDFeVlrTot,&MdfeIndCanalVerde,&MdfeIndCarregaPosterior,&MDFeTipCar,&MDFeProPre,&MDFeProPreNcm,&CountCte) EndIf EndSub Sub 'CheckRequiredFields' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = True If &MDFeTipCar.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Tipo de Carga'), DVMessageType.error, &MDFeTipCar.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If &MDFeProPre.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', Format('WWP_RequiredAttribute','Produto Predominante'), DVMessageType.error, &MDFeProPre.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf If (&CountCte = 1 and (&MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.Prestador or &MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador)) AND &MDFeProPreNcm.IsEmpty() Msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg('', 'Atenção! Ncm Predominante é obrigatório, quando tem somente um documento anexado.', DVMessageType.error, &MDFeProPreNcm.InternalName, DVMessageBoolean.True, '')) &CheckRequiredFieldsResult = False EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If &CountCte = 1 and (&MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.Prestador or &MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador) MDFeProPreNcm_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 RequiredDscTop' Else MDFeProPreNcm_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 col-sm-4 DscTop' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &DelNFe.Click MDFE_NotaFiscal.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &gridMDFeNFeItm, 0, 0,'','',0,'','',0,0) gridNotas.Refresh() EndEvent Event Refresh Do 'DoTotalizar' EndEvent Event &DelCTe.Click MDFE_Cte.Call('DEL', &EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, &gridMDFeCteItm, &gridMDFeCteFilCod,&gridMDFeCteCod,'','',0,'','',0,0,'','') gridCtes.Refresh() EndEvent Event &AlteraNfe.Click WPAddMdfeNfeEdit.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod,&gridMDFeNFeItm) Refresh EndEvent Event &AlteraCte.Click WPAddMdfeCteEdit.Popup(&EmpCod,&FilCod,&MdfeCod,&gridMDFeCteItm) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'DoTotalizar' MDFe_TotalizarNotas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod,&MdfeTotCTe,&MdfeTotNF,&TotMdfeTotNF,&MDFePsoBrt,&MDFeVlrTot) EndSub Sub 'Load' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDfeCod &MDfeUnd = MDfeUnd &MDFeVlrTot = MDFeVlrTot &MDfePsoBrt = MDFePsoBrt &MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = MdfeIndCarregaPosterior &MdfeIndCanalVerde = MdfeIndCanalVerde &MDFeTipEmt = MDFeTipEmt &MDFeTipCar = MDFeTipCar &MDFeProPre = MDFeProPre &MDFeProPreNcm = MDFeProPreNcm If MDFeTipEmt <> MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador If MDFeOriUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod TableIndicador.Visible = True // só pode mostrar as indicações de for transportador de carga Própria e dentro do mesmo estado. EndIf GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.HideTab(2)//esconde cte GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.ShowTab(1) GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.SelectTab(1) Else TableIndicador.Visible = False GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.HideTab(1) //esconde nfe GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.ShowTab(2) GXUITabsPanel_TabsAnexo.SelectTab(2) EndIf // If MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador // TableProPre.Visible = false // Else // TableProPre.Visible = True // EndIf Exit EndFor PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WPMDFe01Documentos', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &Varchar = trim(Substr(&PadObs,1,2)) Do Case Case &Varchar = '01' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.Granelsolido Case &Varchar = '02' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.Granelliquido Case &Varchar = '03' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.Frigorificada Case &Varchar = '04' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.Conteinerizada Case &Varchar = '05' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.cargaGeral Case &Varchar = '06' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.Neogranel Case &Varchar = '07' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.PerigosaGranelSolido Case &Varchar = '08' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.PerigosaGranelLiquido Case &Varchar = '09' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.PerigosaCargaFrigorificada Case &Varchar = '10' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.perigosaConteinerizada Case &Varchar = '11' &MDFeTipCar = TipoCarga.PerigosaCargaGeral EndCase EndIf EndSub
